description: Phase 13: Add abuse graph, spam detection, AI output safety checks, ad policy enforcement, bot detection, content labeling, and safety audit logs to the moderation package. This completes the Phase 13 requirements that are not yet implemented.
steps: Create packages/moderation/src/services/abuse-graph.ts - An AbuseGraphService class that tracks relationships between abusive accounts (shared IPs, shared devices, coordinated activity, follow patterns). Detects abuse rings by finding connected components. Methods: addNode, addEdge, findCluster, getRelatedAccounts, getRiskScore for account based on graph neighbors. Uses adjacency list in-memory.

Create packages/moderation/src/services/spam-detection.ts - A SpamDetectionService class with rate limiting (messages per time window), duplicate content detection (exact and fuzzy matching using simple similarity), link spam detection (excessive URLs, known-bad domains), new account burst detection. Returns SpamVerdict: clean/suspicious/spam with confidence score.

Create packages/moderation/src/services/ai-output-safety.ts - An AIOutputSafetyService class that checks AI-generated content before delivery. Validates: no PII leakage patterns (SSN, credit card, email regex), no harmful instruction generation, content is labeled as AI-generated, confidence thresholds are met. Returns SafetyCheckResult with pass/fail and issues found. Includes a label injection method that adds '[AI Generated]' metadata.

Create packages/moderation/src/services/ad-policy-enforcement.ts - An AdPolicyEnforcementService class that validates ad content against platform policies. Checks: prohibited categories (tobacco, weapons, adult), misleading claims detection (regex patterns for 'guaranteed', '100% cure'), target audience restrictions (no targeting minors), creative compliance (image/text ratio guidelines). Returns PolicyCheckResult with approved/rejected/needs_review.

Create packages/moderation/src/services/bot-detection.ts - A BotDetectionService class that scores accounts for bot-like behavior. Signals: posting frequency (superhuman rates), content repetition, follower/following ratio anomalies, account age vs activity level, interaction patterns (likes without reads). Returns BotScore 0-100 with classification: human/likely_human/suspicious/likely_bot/bot.

Create packages/moderation/src/services/content-labels.ts - A ContentLabelService class that manages content labels and sensitive content warnings. Labels: 'ai_generated', 'mature_content', 'graphic_violence', 'sensitive_topic', 'sponsored', 'political'. Methods: applyLabel, removeLabel, getLabels, shouldWarn (returns whether content needs interstitial warning). Configurable per-app label policies.

Create packages/moderation/src/services/safety-audit-log.ts - A SafetyAuditLogService class that records all moderation/safety events immutably. Events: content_flagged, content_removed, user_warned, user_banned, appeal_submitted, appeal_resolved, policy_changed, manual_override. Each entry has timestamp, actor, target, action, reason, metadata. Append-only with query support.

Add types for all new services to packages/moderation/src/types.ts - AbuseNode, AbuseEdge, AbuseCluster, SpamVerdict, SpamSignal, AIOutputSafetyResult, AdPolicyCheckResult, BotScore, BotClassification, ContentLabel, ContentWarning, SafetyAuditEntry, SafetyEventType.
Export all new services from packages/moderation/src/index.ts barrel.
Create packages/moderation/src/services/abuse-graph.test.ts with tests for cluster detection, risk scoring, and edge cases.
Create packages/moderation/src/services/spam-detection.test.ts with tests for rate limiting, duplicate detection, link spam, and new-account bursts.
Create packages/moderation/src/services/ai-output-safety.test.ts with tests for PII detection, harmful content blocking, AI labeling.
Create packages/moderation/src/services/ad-policy-enforcement.test.ts with tests for prohibited categories, misleading claims, targeting restrictions.
Create packages/moderation/src/services/bot-detection.test.ts with tests for bot scoring across different signal combinations.
Create packages/moderation/src/services/content-labels.test.ts with tests for label application, removal, warning logic.
Create packages/moderation/src/services/safety-audit-log.test.ts with tests for event recording, immutability, and query filtering.
Verify: pnpm --filter @quant/moderation typecheck passes. pnpm --filter @quant/moderation test passes. pnpm --filter @quant/moderation build passes.
acceptance_criteria: AbuseGraphService detects abuse clusters via connected component analysis
SpamDetectionService identifies spam through rate limiting and content similarity
AIOutputSafetyService validates AI output for PII leaks and applies AI-generated labels
AdPolicyEnforcementService validates ads against platform policies
BotDetectionService scores accounts for bot-like behavior
ContentLabelService manages content labels and sensitive content warnings
SafetyAuditLogService records all safety events immutably
All new services have comprehensive test coverage
pnpm --filter @quant/moderation test passes with all new tests green
